title: hieracium murorum subsp. macromallum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. macromallum, also known as Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Hieracium murorum subsp. macromallum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
